name: ATHENA GOLD CORP
business: Athena Gold Corporation is a mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and exploration of gold properties. As of the filing, the company has no producing mines and no revenues.

exposures.sentence: We have no history of or experience in producing gold or other metals.

catalysts.event: Shareholder meeting to vote on redomestication from Delaware to British Columbia
catalysts.sentence: A shareholders meeting is scheduled to be held on March 27, 2025.
